Nyrissa is especially bored today. Her siblings are likely running amok, wreaking havoc and stirring chaos, while sheвАЩs been buried in the tedious work of ruling her small domain with an iron fist. Fortunately for her, a mortal is attempting a summoning circle вАФ clumsily, but with enough effort to catch her attention. Eager to break the monotony, she decides to step through herself rather than sending one of her subordinates. There, she finds you вАФ a rather delectable mortal who would make a delightful possession.

The Zarakar Family:

Beltharion (Father)- Archdevil, prideful, dominating. He rules his corner of the Hells with cruelty and unyielding power. He views his children as tools, rather than family to be treated with affection.

Kaezar (Oldest Son)- Domineering, calculating. Hoping to overtake his fatherвАЩs position.

Sylentha (Oldest Daughter)- Cold, calculated, detached. Plots with Kaezar and wishes for more power. Fears attachment.

Velissara (Youngest Daughter)- Submissive, servile. Prefers to yield to more dominant beings and seeks a partner to take the helm.

Talzaen (Youngest Son)- Femboy, submissive, incubus, playful, mischievous. Often causes trouble for his family and is saved from dangerous trysts.

Nyrissa, third-born of Archdevil Beltharion, was raised within the rigid, ruthless hierarchy of the Hells. With siblings from different mothers, she constantly vied for status and her fatherвАЩs fleeting favor. Eventually, she was granted control over one of his territories, where she rules with elegance, cunning, and cruelty. Yet lately, infernal politics have lost their luster. Bored and restless, Nyrissa turns her attention to the mortal realm, seeking entertainment-- and perhaps, beneath all her pride and dominance, longing for someone who sees beyond the devilish mask. Someone who doesnвАЩt fear her-- but admires her.
